sectionInfo.title: Professional Experience
sectionInfo.description: My journey as a developer, showcasing the projects and roles that have shaped my career.

jobs.title: Graduate Teaching Assistant-Numerical Methods
jobs.description: Led weekly classes and mentored graduate students through advanced software engineering assignments involving complex mathematical problems.
achievements: Mentored 30+ students in implementing numerical algorithms using Python and MATLAB, improving code correctness, performance, and reliability.

Reviewed and validated student code, enforcing quality standards, correctness checks, and edge-case handling,  leading to a 25% improvement in class performance metrics, mirroring enterprise code review practices.
Acted as liaison between faculty and students, resolving academic and technical issues efficiently.

jobs.title: Software Developer
jobs.description: Building and maintaining high-performance backend services and dashboards for banking applications, ensuring security and scalability.
achievements: Built and managed 4+ backend services using Python and Java to support banking applications, processing 20,000+ secure daily transactions with high availability.
Created reusable React.js components and implemented Redis caching, improving dashboard performance and reducing page load times by 35%.
Automated AWS deployments with CloudFormation and CI/CD pipelines, shortening release cycles from 2 weeks to 3 days.
Integrated MySQL and NoSQL databases into transaction monitoring systems, boosting query speed by 40% and enhancing fraud detection accuracy.
Collaborated with a 6-member cross-functional team to develop compliance features, achieving 100% audit readiness for internal banking applications.

jobs.title: Intern
jobs.description: Developed a Pega-based platform to streamline service bookings and automate customer workflows.
achievements: Developed a Pega-based service booking application supporting 1,000+ concurrent users and servicing an annual project scope valued at $100K+.
Automated business processes using declarative rules, data pages, and case types, improving task routing and execution efficiency.
Reduced booking time by 30% by enhancing UI/UX with dynamic forms, reusable components, and conditional layouts.
Improved application performance by 40% by optimizing case processing stages and eliminating redundant rule executions.

jobs.title: Cloud Engineering Intern
jobs.description: Designed and deployed secure, fault-tolerant cloud systems using core AWS services with a focus on automation and monitoring.
achievements: Configured and deployed infrastructure using EC2, S3, and CloudFormation
Gained hands-on experience with containerized services and Kubernetes orchestration
Engineered high-availability cloud systems with secure, fault-tolerant setups, reducing latency by 35%.
Developed serverless applications using API Gateway, IAM, and DynamoDB for efficient cloud-native workflows.
Automated provisioning of VPCs, EC2 instances, and IAM roles using Infrastructure-as-Code templates with AWS CloudFormation.
Implemented proactive troubleshooting measures with alarms and log filters to maintain compliance and encryption standards.
Collaborated with virtual teams to complete cloud project milestones in a 10-week internship.
